productName: Green Reaper - Reaper Diamonds (THCA) - Super Silver Haze - 1g
description: Crystalline sativa THCa from Super Silver Haze, an ultra-refined concentrate that decarboxylates into active THC when dabbed or vaped, delivering serious strength. Clean, crystalline, and intensely potent — with notes of citrus, skunk, and earthy, with a bright, heady lift.
